response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Set CH1 Termination and Take Screenshot","description":"Sets CH1 input termination to 50 ohms on an MSO4/5/6 Series scope, then captures a screenshot.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"s2","type":"write","label":"Set CH1 Termination to 50 Ohms","params":{"command":"CH1:TERmination 50"}},{"id":"s3","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}},{"id":"s4","type":"save_screenshot","label":"Save Screenshot","params":{"filename":"capture.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}},{"id":"s5","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}
